meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Your SaaS: Advanced User Onboarding for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to implement expert-level user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to convert your student projects into SaaS.
content.answer_block: To scale your project, move beyond simple sign-ups. Implement a data-driven, automated user onboarding flow that guides users to their 'Aha!' moment within minutes. By integrating Antigravity for state orchestration and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you can convert casual visitors into power users, effectively solving your scaling bottleneck.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding your first SaaS, but the user retention metrics are flatlining. The cold reality of software engineering is that great code doesn't guarantee adoption; a seamless journey from registration to value does. You are currently hitting a wall where your feature set is robust, but your user growth is stagnant because you lack a structured path for new users to find value.

This is the threshold between a hobbyist project and a professional-grade application. We are going to replace your static welcome screens with a dynamic, state-aware onboarding architecture. By leveraging Antigravity for complex logic flows and Claude Code to iterate at the speed of thought, you will transform your project into a high-conversion machine that scales effortlessly.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define the user journey states before writing code. We need to map out the 'Aha!' moment and the required steps to get there.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a state machine diagram for a SaaS onboarding flow. Include states for: 'Account Created', 'Profile Setup', 'First Integration', and 'Dashboard Active'. Ensure the path is optimized for minimal friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a file named onboarding-states.ts defining the state machine logic for our user journey'.

steps.title: Implementing Context-Aware Progress Tracking
steps.description: Users need to know how far they are. We will implement a persistent progress tracker that syncs with your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component for an onboarding progress bar that fetches current user completion status from a Supabase backend and animates progress dynamically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add a progress-tracker component to the existing layout using the logic defined in onboarding-states.ts'.

steps.title: Building Automated Value Triggers
steps.description: Trigger specific tooltips or modals when users interact with key features to ensure they understand your core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a hook that detects when a user performs a core action (e.g., creating their first record) and triggers a success modal using the onboarding state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement value-trigger hooks in core app modules to drive user engagement'.

steps.title: Implementing Adaptive Email Sequences
steps.description: If a user drops off, your system must know. We will integrate an automated follow-up sequence based on the onboarding state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a webhook handler that sends a personalized email via Resend if a user remains in the 'Profile Setup' state for more than 24 hours.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Setup a serverless function to handle onboarding drop-off emails based on user state updates'.

steps.title: A/B Testing the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Use data to refine the flow. We will set up event tracking to identify where users are churning.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate PostHog tracking into the onboarding flow to measure conversion rates at each step of the defined state machine.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add PostHog event tracking to all onboarding state transitions for analytics'.

pro_tips: Never force a user to verify email before showing them the app; prioritize the 'Aha!' moment and ask for verification later.
Use 'Empty State' design patterns as onboarding opportunities; show users how to fill the space rather than just showing a blank screen.
Implement a 'skip' option for power users who want to jump straight to the dashboard without a tutorial.
Always measure the time-to-first-value (TTFV) metric; if it exceeds 3 minutes, your onboarding is too complex.
Use session persistence to ensure that if a user refreshes the page, they resume exactly where they left off in the onboarding flow.
content.next_steps: After completing your onboarding flow, deploy your changes to a staging environment and conduct a 'blind test' with a peer to see if they can reach the dashboard without your verbal instructions. Monitor your PostHog dashboard for 48 hours to identify high-drop-off points.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just building features; you are engineering growth. With this framework, you've bridged the gap between a prototype and a professional SaaS experience. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
